Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Current Phase Status
Content:
Phases 0-4 complete. Sprint 40 P0/P1 fixes deployed. Phase 5 (intent reliability, adaptive execution) is the current focus.

Phase 0 (Skeleton): all interfaces, wiki pages, CI baseline.
Phase 1 (Core MVP): MinecraftAdapter.ConnectAsync with subprocess launch and port-wait, MoveToTool, StatusTool, AgentBackgroundService hosted loop.
Phase 2 (Memory): RestMemoryGateway (IHttpClientFactory), SearchMemoryTool, GetPageTool, CreatePageTool, MockMemoryGateway. SearchResult.Kind disambiguates page slugs from memory UUIDs.
Phase 3 (Planner): HtnPlanner (await/try-catch ReplanAsync), HtnTaskLibrary (8 task methods), GatherWoodGoal, SurviveNightGoal, IGoalFactory, GoalFactory, POST /api/agent/plan, GET /api/goals.
Phase 4 (Sprint 40 — complete): ActionData.Context bag, WebSocketBridge with background receive loop, MineflayerAdapter/index.js with pathfinder. Block position off-by-one fixed (findBestBlock three-pass scorer + Y-penalty + grass_block alias). Dig infinite-loop fixed (MAX_DIG_FAILURES=3). Stall retry graduated from 60s fixed to [10,20,30,60]s with chat notification. build + 63 tests green.

Phase 5 (started — Sprint 41): Intent parsing reliability (ollama 3B insufficient), goto() timeout safety, path_update wiring, stale-inventory guard at goal-creation.

CI baseline: 63 tests passing. Last green build: Sprint 40 P0 fixes. Repo: https://github.com/TheMasonX/MemorySmith.Agent
